---
title: Untitled
format:
  ucl-revealjs-revealjs: default
author: 
  name: Your Name
  affiliation: 
    name: University College London
    department: Department of Quarto Slides
    url: https://www.ucl.ac.uk
  degrees: PhD
  orcid: 0000-0001-7401-9802
  url: https://www.ucl.ac.uk
# embed-resources: true  # use this option for publication
---

# Section 1 {.dark}

## Introduction

Here is a slide

## Another slide

Here is another slide

# Section 2 {.dark}

## And yet more slides
